name: CDIF Long Data Structure
abstract: Defines properties: @type, cdi:hasPhysicalMapping, cdi:arrayBase, csvw:delimiter, csvw:header, csvw:headerRowCount, csvw:commentPrefix, csvw:skipBlankRows, csvw:skipInitialSpace, csvw:skipRows, csvw:lineTerminators, csvw:quoteChar, cdi:isDelimited, cdi:isFixedWidth, cdi:escapeCharacter. Uses building blocks: cdifPhysicalMapping (cdifProperties).
